title: Awake My Soul

sections.label: Intro
lines: Awake my soul, a song to sing,
Beneath the heavens, let joy ring.
From the sunrise to the evening light,
Your love endures, steady and bright.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: My heart is steadfast, O my King,
Through trials and triumphs, I will sing.
Your faithfulness, like the open skies,
Lifts my spirit, helps me rise.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: I will praise You with all my might,
From mountain shadows to stars of night.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Your love reaches higher than the heavens,
Your truth shines brighter than the stars.
With wings of glory, You hold creation,
Forever faithful, forever You are.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Awake the dawn with a melody pure,
Through storms and valleys, Your word is sure.
The nations tremble, but I stand tall,
Your power redeems, it conquers all.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Send Your light, let it guide our way,
Through every shadow, night turns to day.
With You, O Lord, I’ll never fear,
Your voice is the song I long to hear.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Your love reaches higher than the heavens,
Your truth shines brighter than the stars.
With wings of glory, You hold creation,
Forever faithful, forever You are.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Forever faithful, steady as the morning,
Your love endures, Your truth is calling.

epigraph: I will sing and give praise
